items.title: A feedforward loop between STAT1 and YAP1 stimulates lipid biosynthesis, accelerates tumor growth, and promotes chemotherapy resistance in mutant KRAS colorectal cancer
items.author: Antonis E. Koromilas
items.content: In mutant KRAS colorectal cancer cells, the transcription factor STAT1 is tumorigenic by promoting cell survival and proliferation via a positive feedback loop involving YAP1 and the mevalonate pathway, thus conferring chemotherapy resistance.

items.title: Cascade amplification of therapeutic payloads for cancer immunotherapy
items.author: Libin Zhang
items.content: A Cascade Amplification of Therapeutic Payloads, by co-delivery of self-amplifying mRNA and modified mRNA encoding alphavirus capsids and envelopes, realizes hundred times increases of expression by same dosage, broadening therapeutic applications.

items.title: Bacterial regulation of coral larval metamorphosis and settlement in Pocillopora damicornis
items.author: Yanying Zhang
items.content: Microbial high-throughput sequencing combined with proteomic and metabolomic analyses reveal that Metabacillus indicus cB07 alters microbial communities and induces settlement of Pocillopora damicornis larvae via key metabolic pathways.

items.title: NAD+-dependent Sirt6 is a key regulator involved in telomere shortening of in vitro-cultured preimplantation embryos
items.author: Qifeng Lyu
items.content: NAD+ deficiency impairing Sirt6 function reveals the mechanism of in vitro culture-induced telomere shortening in preimplantation embryos, providing a target to improve IVF outcomes.

items.title: Genomic resequencing reveals genetic diversity, population structure, and core collection of durian germplasm
items.author: Xuejie Feng
items.content: Whole-genome resequencing of 114 durian accessions defines a genetically diverse core collection and reveals shared selection signals, providing foundational resources for breeding and conservation.

items.title: HEP14-activated PKC-ERK1/2 pathway boosts HEP14-empowered hADSCs for ovarian regeneration and functional restoration
items.author: Liming Gui
items.content: HEP14, a PKC pathway activator, enhances ovarian regeneration of human adipose-derived stem cells for regenerative potential by activating the PKC-ERK1/2 pathway to upregulate MMP1, PDGFD, and STC1 in premature ovarian insufficiency and aging mice.

items.title: Identification of conserved frontal neurophysiological markers of cognitive flexibility in humans and rats
items.author: Diego A. Pizzagalli
items.content: Integration of a probabilistic reversal learning task aligned between humans and rodents demonstrates concordant behavioral, computational, and neurophysiological measures of cognitive flexibility between species.

items.title: Author Correction: Molecular mechanisms of MAZ targeting up-regulation of NDUFS3 expression to promote malignant progression in melanoma
items.author: Yuechun Zhu
items.content: Author Correction: Molecular mechanisms of MAZ targeting up-regulation of NDUFS3 expression to promote malignant progression in melanoma
